items.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Advances While Market Declines: Some Information for Investors
items.description: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) closed the most recent trading day at $285.25, moving +1.03% from the previous trading session.

items.title: $1000 Invested In UnitedHealth Group 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
4 HMO Stocks to Watch Despite Escalating Costs, Nursing Shortage
items.description: The Medical-HMO industry leverages technology capabilities and M&A to fuel growth. Yet rising medical costs, workforce shortages and policy shifts pose roadblocks. UNH, CI, HUM and CNC are likely to navigate industry storms.
